zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emma Belet於大約1224年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特瓦布盧可時，她的父親Ralph Belet37歲，母親Sybil de Cormeilles33歲。她於大約1251年與Robert Olivier在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1281年在英國薩默塞特瓦布盧可享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Emma Belet于大约1224年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特瓦布盧可时，她的父亲Ralph Belet37岁，母亲Sybil de Cormeilles33岁。她于大约1251年与Robert Olivier在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1281年在英国薩默塞特瓦布盧可享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Raymonde.
French: nickname from a derivative of   Bel   ‘beautiful’. This surname is also found in Haiti.
Altered form of Polish Bilot, unexplained. The surname Bilot is very rare in Poland.

variants.name: Blot
meanings: North German: nickname for a destitute person or someone without a beard or scantily dressed, from Middle Low German blōt ‘bare, naked, poor’. This surname is very rare in Germany.
French: shortened form of   Belot  . This surname is also found in Haiti.
French: habitational name from Blot-l'Église in Puy-de-Dôme.

variants.name: Bel
meanings: French: nickname for a handsome man (perhaps also ironically for an ugly one), from Old French beu, bel ‘beautiful, handsome’ (from Late Latin bellus). Compare Lebel and Beau .

Hungarian (Bél): from the old personal name Bél, or perhaps from bél ‘inside, internal part’. The latter may have been an occupational name for an indoor servant, i.e. one who worked inside a great house.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emma Belet was born about 1224, in Wambrook, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Belet, was 37 and her mother, Sybil de Cormeilles, was 33. She married Robert Olivier about 1251, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1281, in Wambrook, Somerset, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emma Belet est née environ 1224, à Wambrook, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Belet, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Cormeilles, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Olivier environ 1251, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1281, à Wambrook, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emma Belet um 1224 in Wambrook, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Belet 37 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Cormeilles 33. Sie hat um 1251 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Robert Olivier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1281 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Wambrook, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emma Belet è nata il circa 1224 nel Wambrook, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Belet, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Cormeilles, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert Olivier circa 1251, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1281, nel Wambrook, Somerset, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emma Beletが約1224年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトワンブルークで生まれた時，父Ralph Beletは37歳，母Sybil de Cormeillesは33歳であった。約1251年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRobert Olivierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1281年にイギリスソメルセトワンブルークで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emma Belet(이)가 대략 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 와브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Belet(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Cormeilles(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Robert Olivier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 영국 서머세트 와브룩에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emma Belet nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Wambrook, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Belet, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Cormeilles, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Olivier aproximadamente 1251, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1281, em Wambrook, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emma Belet родилась около 1224 г. в местности вамбрук, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Belet было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Cormeilles, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Olivier около 1251 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1281 г. в местности вамбрук, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Emma Belet nació aproximadamente 1224, en Wambrook, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Belet, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sybil de Cormeilles, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert Olivier aproximadamente 1251, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1281, en Wambrook, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
